reviews.评论产品的属性: Flavor Name=Variety: Country Stew & Chicken & Rice;Size=24 Count (Pack of 1)
reviews.评论: I consider the can as part of the product. Therefore, I won‘t buy this product in this quantity ever again. I wouldn‘t recommend this to any one else either. At least half of the cans were bent to a point that the gravy was leaking from the can and had to be tossed out with the garbage. Complete waist of money. These cans had to be considered contaminated, not knowing how long they had been exposed through the crack in the can. Also, a couple of cans could not even be opened due to the crushed condition of the can.

reviews.标题: Cans arrived banged up and some leaking

My dogs really like this product, only issue I have is some of the cans came with large dents. That caused the per usable can price to go higher than if I would buy it at my local store

I bought this item a few times and the last time it made my dog puke. He was fine the next day after it was out of his system. The can was sealed and in good condition, the food had the same color and texture as the last case of cans had, but this one made him ill.

reviews.标题: Dog food fine, shipping not so fine
reviews.评论: This dog food is fine, I‘ve fed it to my last three dogs without a problem. Shipping, though is a problem. Amazon puts three cases (a total of more than 29 pounds) in a single, quite flimsy box. The box rips in shipping, and some of the cans get pretty badly banged u, though I’ve never yet had to throw any out. Amazon, please limit to two cases per bxo.
Did not agree with my dogs tummy

So, we were feeding this to our dogs daily. We would switch up the flavors and consistency, but huskies are picky when it comes to this kind of food. At least ours are. We had multiple nights were the dogs would straight up choose to go hungry,. We tried everything microwaving it, putting it in special bowls, making an all out production for each feeding, sticking with a flavor, different flavor every day, changing up brands...we gave up on it. Now they get free fed Nutrish dry food and we cook them chicken and rice twice a day. They are healthier than they‘ve ever been. I don‘t believe that this food is high quality. It smelled bad, and it was super thick and sticky and nasty feeling regardless of whether you got the pate or the chunks in gravy. I don‘t trust the ingredients at all. Only good things I can say about it is that being canned they have long self lives, and they didn‘t cause the dogs to have digestion issues. Personally this stuff was expensive and the dog‘s wouldn‘t eat it unless they were starving. I won‘t feed it to them again.

This is not classic ground!! It is chunks in gravy and now I can’t return this!! Perhaps because I opened two cans to double check  (which is how I found out what it actually was, but what else could I do?) This appears to be a mislabeling issue because every can and the packaging states it is “classic ground”. Buyer Beware!!!
Half the cans are bent badly. Really disappointed.
One dog did not like it

reviews.评论产品的属性: Flavor Name=Chicken & Brown Rice;Size=13 Ounce (Pack of 12)
reviews.评论: After multiple orders, this package was received in an undamaged box with two other products.  As can be seen in the picture, one of the cans was crushed, likely before shipping, to the extent that it is open.  Regretfully, this product is not eligible for either a return or refund.
8 out of 12 cans were crushed. That’s $30 for 4 cans of dog food.I go without food to feed my pets, maybe others are in the similar position and this isn’t worth it.
My 2 dogs got severe diarrhea from it.

reviews.评论产品的属性: Flavor Name=Chicken & Brown Rice;Size=13 Ounce (Pack of 12)
reviews.标题: Dented cans almost every time, (85% of the time)
reviews.评论: If you order this dog food you will receive dented cans almost every time, (85% of the time). My order today had a torn box and 4 of six cans have dents at the top rim. The cans have pull tab tops. If the top rim of the can is dented it can compromise the seal where the can lid is thin/scored to allow it to be opened without a can opener. You can not easily return the product if damaged.
All cans labeled “Classic Ground“ and are not ground. They are all cuts in gravy. My 14-year-old pug has no teeth to chew the chunks. Every single can being mislabeled is crazy.
Arrived damaged. Every can was dented and some open completely. Total mess

This was horrible on both their digestive systems. Didn‘t even feel safe donating it and the it out!
